---
title: Model Code
filters:
   - include-code-files
---

## Entities and Resources

### Patient

```{.python include="../class_patient.py"}
```

### Vehicle Classes

#### Ambulance

```{.python include="../class_ambulance.py"}
```

#### HEMS

```{.python include="../class_hems.py"}
```


#### HEMS Availability

```{.python include="../class_hems_availability.py"}
```


## Simulation

```{.python include="../des_hems.py"}
```

## Model Running

```{.python include="../des_parallel_process.py"}
```
